## Summary
- what changed?
- why now?

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` (when CLI surface changed)
- [ ] `bash scripts/release-smoke.sh` (when packaging/runtime surface changed)

## Docs
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] `docs/cli-spec.md` updated
- [ ] changelog updated when needed

## Risk notes
- breaking change?
- installer impact?
- state/config compatibility impact?
